hero.title: Thinking through the living of it.
hero.subtitle: Notes on psychology, philosophy, and the questions I keep returning to.
home.heroMicro: Updated when there is something worth saying.
home.authorIntro: I work with data and design by day. The rest of the time, I think about what holds things together beneath the surface — in people, in systems, in ideas. This is where that thinking lives.
writing.title: Writing
writing.description: Thoughts on psychology, philosophy, and the things that stay with me.
writing.noArticles: Nothing here yet. The thinking continues.
themes.title: Threads
themes.description: Short thoughts, reading notes, and daily observations.
about.bio1: I live in Australia, and I work with data and design. That's the day job. But what I find myself thinking about, more and more, is the other side of things — what goes on beneath decisions, beneath patterns, beneath the stories we tell ourselves without noticing.
about.bio2: I'm drawn to Jung, to Daoist thinking, to the kind of philosophy that doesn't announce itself. The questions that interest me most are the ones without clean answers — how we individuate, how we make meaning, how we live with what we can't resolve.
about.whatIWriteBody: This site is where I think out loud. The writing touches psychology, philosophy, and the structures beneath everyday experience. If there's a thread, it's an interest in what's actually happening — under the surface, under the habit.
about.quote: I'd rather be interested than interesting. And I'd like to write clearly enough that some of that interest comes through.
subscribe.title: Stay with the thinking
subscribe.description: Receive new reflections by email, at a quiet pace.
subscribe.subscribed: Thank you. Check your email for a welcome note.
subscribe.error: That didn't work. Would you try again?
subscribe.confirmed: You're on the list now. Thank you for wanting to read along.
subscribe.unsubscribed: You've been removed from the list. No more emails.
subscribe.invalidToken: This link is no longer valid. You're welcome to subscribe again if you'd like.
subscribe.pageDescription: New writing by email, when there's something to say. Nothing else.

contact.name: Name

support.title: Support This Writing
support.description: This site has no ads, no sponsors, and no paywalls. If the writing has meant something to you and you'd like to help it continue, I'm grateful.
support.whyBody: Everything here is written and maintained by one person. Your support covers hosting and the time it takes to think and write carefully. That's all it goes toward.
support.internationalDescription: Support via Stripe — credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay accepted.
support.chinaDescription: Scan the QR code to support via Alipay.
support.thankYouBody: Thank you. It means more than I can say easily.
about.connectDescription: If any of this resonates, there are a few ways to connect.

about.supportWorkDesc: If you'd like to help this site stay independent.
